topics.label: Setup (UCBLogo/FMSLogo)
topics.description: Install a Logo interpreter. Logo was designed for children to learn programming.

topics.label: Turtle Commands
topics.description: FORWARD, BACK, RIGHT, LEFT, PENUP, PENDOWN. Control the turtle to draw.

topics.label: Repeat & Procedures
topics.description: REPEAT n [commands] for loops. TO name :param ... END for procedures.

topics.label: Variables & Lists
topics.description: MAKE for variables, lists with brackets []. Logo is a Lisp dialect with turtle graphics.

topics.label: Recursion
topics.description: Recursive procedures for fractals and complex patterns. Trees, spirals, Koch snowflake.

topics.label: Colors & Shapes
topics.description: SETPENCOLOR, FILL, SETPENSIZE. Create colorful artwork with code.
